creator: obrien@cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
No entry for intro in section 4 of the manual.  However numerous places
	intro(4) is refered to in the "See Also" section of other manpages.
	One example is intro(1).

Fix: Submiting intro.4 (uuencoded).  Granted it is rough, but it is a start
	for someone more knowledgeable than I.
How-To-Repeat: 
	man 4 intro
